_instructions: Work experience timeline. 'logo' uses simpleicons.org or Google's favicon service.
subtitle: Where I've measured what matters

experiences.title: Analytics Engineer — Development
responsibilities: Designed and executed analytics projects measuring email campaign performance, SMS/text channel effectiveness, and lifecycle marketing KPIs, delivering data-driven insights to executive and marketing stakeholders.
Established measurement frameworks — metric definitions, experimentation design, and test-and-learn methodologies — to evaluate fundraising and marketing channel performance.
Built self-service Tableau and Power BI dashboards enabling stakeholders to monitor operational and financial KPIs, reducing ad hoc reporting requests by 40%.
Served as analytics subject matter expert for data teams, translating complex business questions into scalable solutions using SQL (Snowflake), Python, and dbt.
Developed automated data-quality testing and validation frameworks, improving trust in business-critical reporting across loan performance, customer acquisition, and revenue metrics.
Optimized Snowflake warehouse performance through query tuning, clustering strategies, and transformation efficiencies, reducing compute costs by 25%.
Built AI-ready and analytics-ready datasets supporting predictive analytics, customer segmentation, and campaign audience strategies.

experiences.title: Data Engineer (Analytics Focus)
responsibilities: Built enterprise-scale data pipelines and analytics solutions processing millions of customer, transaction, and marketing records to support performance reporting and channel analytics.
Developed dimensional data models and data marts supporting marketing analytics, business intelligence, and experimentation measurement across multiple business domains.
Implemented Change Data Capture (CDC) pipelines improving data freshness for real-time performance dashboards and reporting.
Designed and maintained Tableau and Power BI dashboards consumed by marketing and operations stakeholders for performance tracking and decision-making.
Applied intermediate-to-advanced SQL (MSSQL, Redshift, Snowflake) to develop performance reports, audience segmentation queries, and ad hoc analyses supporting strategy teams.
Implemented automated data-quality monitoring, reconciliation, and auditing processes improving analytical data reliability across business-critical datasets.
Leveraged AWS (S3, Glue, Lambda, Redshift, Athena, CloudWatch) to build and maintain cloud-native analytics infrastructure supporting scalable reporting.

experiences.title: Junior Data Engineer
responsibilities: Developed SQL and Python-based ETL pipelines supporting SaaS product analytics, lifecycle marketing reporting, and executive dashboards.
Built reporting datasets and KPI scorecards consumed by BI teams using Tableau and Power BI, improving visibility into product and operational performance.
Utilized Azure Data Factory (ADF), ADLS, and Azure SQL Database to orchestrate automated data workflows and analytics pipelines.
Implemented data validation checks, schema enforcement, and reconciliation processes improving reliability and accuracy of marketing and operational analytics.
Collaborated with analysts, product teams, and business users to translate requirements into scalable analytics solutions.
Optimized SQL queries and dashboard refresh performance, reducing report generation time by 30%.
